title: SSR-Controlled Water Cooling Jacket
selected_approach: FOTEK SSR-25DA solid-state relay switches a 12V DC pump circulating coolant through a copper-coil jacket surrounding a 500 mL reaction vessel. Arduino PWM on the SSR control input (0-5V) modulates effective cooling rate. 5A inline fuse on pump supply. Relay opto-isolated from MCU.
